analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet lists concrete EU measures to counter terrorism (cut financing, counter organized crime, address radicalisation, strengthen borders, improve police/judicial cooperation) and invites readers to discover more EU actions. Evaluation: EU1 (successful story) – not explicitly about history or past successes; no. EU2 (unity) – no mention of unity or agreement among member states; no. EU3 (useful for its citizens) – yes: it showcases practical EU policies addressing citizens’ security concerns with concrete measures, portraying the EU as proactive and effective domestically. EU4 (avant‑garde) – not framed as pioneering or leading-edge regulation; no. EU5 (global champion of fair causes) – focus is security/terrorism, not rights advocacy; no. EU6 (better world) – focus is internal EU security, not global contributions; no. Conclusion: The tweet promotes EU3.
